body:value: Data refers to state/UT wise number of persons killed, injured in Accidents caused due to all other causes. Data of road accidents in India are collected by Transport Research Wing (TRW) of Ministry of Road Transport & Highways from the Police Headquarters of the various states, UTs and Million Plus cities in India through specially designated nodal officers(DGP/ADGP(Crime)/ADGP(Traffic)/ Director (State Crime Record Bureau) in a 19-item format devised under Asia Pacific Road Accidents Data(APRAD)/ Indian Road Accident Data(IRAD) project of the United Nations Economic and Social Commission for the Asia & the Pacific(UNESCAP).

body:value: The data refers to State/UT wise statistics of Persons Injured in road accidents. Dataset contains information like Total Number of Persons Injured in Road Accidents, Share of States/UTs in Total Number of Persons Injured in Road Accidents, Total Number of Persons Injured in Road Accidents Per Lakh Population, Total Number of Persons Injured in Road Accidents per 10,000 Vehicles, Total Number of Persons Injured in Road Accidents per 10,000 Km of Roads. Data of road accidents in India are collected by Transport Research Wing (TRW) of Ministry of Road Transport & Highways from the Police Headquarters of the various states, UTs and Million Plus cities in India through specially designated nodal officers(DGP/ADGP(Crime)/ADGP(Traffic)/ Director (State Crime Record Bureau) in a 19-item format devised under Asia Pacific Road Accidents Data(APRAD)/ Indian Road Accident Data(IRAD) project of the United Nations Economic and Social Commission for the Asia & the Pacific(UNESCAP).

body:value: The data refers to state/UT wise total number of road accidents in India classified according to types of vehicles and objects primarily responsible. Vehicles and objects primarily responsible have been classified as Two-Wheelers, Auto-Rickshaws, Cars/Jeeps/Taxis,Buses,Trucks/Tempos/MAVs/Tractors, Other Motor Vehicles and Other Vehicles/Objects. Dataset contains information like total Number of Road Accidents, number of Persons Killed and Injured. Data of road accidents in India are collected by Transport Research Wing (TRW) of Ministry of Road Transport & Highways from the Police Headquarters of the various states, UTs and Million Plus cities in India through specially designated nodal officers(DGP/ADGP(Crime)/ADGP(Traffic)/ Director (State Crime Record Bureau) in a 19-item format devised under Asia Pacific Road Accidents Data(APRAD)/ Indian Road Accident Data(IRAD) project of the United Nations Economic and Social Commission for the Asia & the Pacific(UNESCAP).

title: Village wise distribution of deep tubewells by type

body:value: The data refers to village wise number of Deep Tubewells permanent not in use due to Salinity, Drying up, Destroyed beyond repair and Sinking.
